name: Calix Drenn
rank: Field Compliance Officer (enforces FTA regulations at street level)
sd_appearance: Human, average height and build, moving with a youthful intensity. Skin pale from years in the Undercity's shadows, short black hair slicked back, eyes a piercing blue. Wearing a pristine Field Compliance Officer uniform of the Tower Authority, emblazoned with insignia and adorned with plate armor. A longsword and heavy crossbow holstered, a badge of the Faction visible on the chest. Distinctive visual detail: a silver feather pin, a symbol of his junior intake program, pinned to the collar of his uniform.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: armour maintained to standard, rank markings clearly displayed
